name: Arata Kirishima
description:
Father of Touka Kirishima and Ayato Kirishima. Virtuous and gentle, Arata is a pacifist ghoul who is content to live peacefully with humans and wants the same for his children.

~!Arata's status is currently unknown. However, it is known that his kagune is currently being used as CCG's new exoskeleton armor.!~
